allow: Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd ~/.guilherme/portifolio-v8 && npm install 2>&1 && echo '---AUDIT---' && npm audit 2>&1")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd ~/.guilherme/portifolio-v8 && npm ls postcss 2>&1; cat package.json | grep -A5 overrides")
Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc "cd ~/.guilherme/portifolio-v8 && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install 2>&1 | tail -30")
